social: Calms down when spoken to or picked up
cognitive: Looks at a toy for several seconds
physical: Holds head up when on tummy
Moves both arms and both legs

social: Smiles on their own to get your attention
communication: Turns head towards the sound of your voice
cognitive: If hungry, opens mouth when seeing breast or bottle
Looks at their hands with interest
physical: Holds a toy when you put it in their hand

social: Likes to look at themselves in a mirror
communication: Takes turns making sounds with you
cognitive: Puts things in mouth to explore them
Reaches to grab a toy they want
Closes lips to show they don't want more food
physical: Pushes up with straight arms when on tummy
Leans on hands to support themselves when sitting

social: Is shy, clingy, or fearful around strangers
Smiles or laughs when you play peek-a-boo
communication: Lifts arms to be picked up
cognitive: Looks for objects when dropped out of sight
physical: Gets to a sitting position by themselves
